longBusinessSummary: Carnarvon Energy Limited engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas properties in Australia. It owns various interests in the Dorado, Pavo, Roc, Phoenix, and Phoenix South project located in the Bedout Sub-basin permits of Western Australia. The company engages in carbon initiatives and new energy business. The company was incorporated in 1983 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
